Uncompute the hashes so the result stays reversible.

Use BOTH d and q: hash the pattern and the first window, update the hash incrementally as the window slides (each step taking the result modulo q), and only confirm a candidate by direct comparison when the hashes are equal. Uncompute the hashes so the result stays reversible.
